problem id: aea14651
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) OR SHL(4)

examples:
  10100010 -> 10101000
  01010001 -> 01010100
  01111100 -> 11011111
  00101111 -> 11111011
  11101011 -> 11111010
  10010110 -> 11100101
  10000100 -> 01100001
  10000000 -> 00100000

query: 01110011
predicted answer: 11111100
